adjacents.field: empirical validation (Eyewitness numbers on the landing page)

observation: Scribe Landing opened. Primary field covers the 10-section Founder-approved landing layout, Chapter 1 live, Chapter 2 Mellon committed to 'this weekend' via K435, Lighthouse 99/100/96/100 + SSL Labs A+ locked B116.

Cost-Slasher callout + HOT $/correct column shipped to landing page (commit 149dd2d). Haiku $0.0067 vs Opus $0.1289 = 19× cost delta at identical 98.7% HOT accuracy. 'Guaranteed' explicitly rejected — math carries the claim.
Lighthouse fixes shipped (commit c404c6e): copy-btn contrast, cost-slasher h3→h2, playground select label, Google Fonts async-load. Perf 88→99, A11y 79→100.

Chapter 3 teaser decision (Founder-agreed B116): landing page gets NO member-Cathedral marketing copy until SCEV-1 empirical test produces numbers. When Mellon ships Chapter 2 (K435, this weekend), a Chapter 3 teaser block will be added — placeholder wording only ('Your Cathedral: coming after Mellon — empirically validated'). Full marketing copy waits for SCEV-1 numbers to replicate the Cost-Slasher pattern (math-carries-the-claim, no adjectives without data).

K435 shipped: Chapter 2 Mellon LIVE on librarian.the2ndsecond.com. Landing page now has #chapter-2 section (not just teaser) with multilingual Eyewitness table, language selector (EN/ES) wired into playground, header nav item. Lighthouse 100/100 (Perf + A11y), SSL Labs A+ — no regression from Chapter 1 pass. Founder-voice hooks placed for chapter_2_hero / chapter_2_scene / chapter_2_origin. Under-promise-over-deliver discipline validated on first trial: 'Coming next week' landed same evening the teaser was updated. Meta-description updated to include multilingual claim.

Chapter 2 teaser slot consumed; Chapter 3 teaser now pending a Bishop-B117 decision on timing copy. Current state: chapter-teaser CSS class is reusable (renamed from .chapter2-teaser), ready for Chapter 3 content when empirical story lands (SCEV-1 full-sealed). Recommended copy pattern: 'Chapter 3 — [name] — coming after empirical validation' — avoids repeating the date-slip risk until numbers warrant specificity.
canonical_ref: hosted/index.html .chapter-teaser class + B116 SCEV-1 prelim PASS
